overrides.expect: C = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \{Y _ {1} - 1 \} & \text {if Y_{1} = Y_{2}} \\ \{(Y _ {1} + Y _ {2}) / 2 \} & \text {if Y_{1} \neq Y_{2}}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: C = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \{Y _ {1} - 1 \} & \text {if } Y_{1} = Y_{2} \\ \{(Y _ {1} + Y _ {2}) / 2 \} & \text {if } Y_{1} \neq Y_{2}. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r c l} X \in R & \Longrightarrow & \text {reject H_{0}} \\ X \notin R & \Longrightarrow & \text {retain (do not reject) H_{0}} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{r c l} X \in R & \Longrightarrow & \text {reject } H_{0} \\ X \notin R & \Longrightarrow & \text {retain (do not reject) } H_{0} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r c l l} \theta & = & \mathbb {E} (C _ {1}) - \mathbb {E} (C _ {0}) \\ & = & \mathbb {E} (C _ {1} | X = 1) - \mathbb {E} (C _ {0} | X = 0) & \text {since X\amalg(C_{0} , C_{1})} \\ & = & \mathbb {E} (Y | X = 1) - \mathbb {E} (Y | X = 0) & \text {since Y = C_{X}} \\ & = & \alpha . \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{r c l l} \theta & = & \mathbb {E} (C _ {1}) - \mathbb {E} (C _ {0}) \\ & = & \mathbb {E} (C _ {1} | X = 1) - \mathbb {E} (C _ {0} | X = 0) & \text {since } X\amalg(C_{0} , C_{1}) \\ & = & \mathbb {E} (Y | X = 1) - \mathbb {E} (Y | X = 0) & \text {since } Y = C_{X} \\ & = & \alpha . \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r c l} X & \sim & \text {Normal (0,1)} \\ Y \mid X = x & \sim & \text {Normal (\alpha x, 1)} \\ Z \mid X = x, Y = y & \sim & \text {Normal (\beta y + \gamma x, 1)}. \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{r c l} X & \sim & \operatorname{Normal} (0,1) \\ Y \mid X = x & \sim & \operatorname{Normal} (\alpha x, 1) \\ Z \mid X = x, Y = y & \sim & \operatorname{Normal} (\beta y + \gamma x, 1). \end{array}
